base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of small_fire_mario_glitch — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Glitch-state Small Mario rendered with Fire-palette colors. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Glitch-state Small Mario rendered with Fire-palette colors; reached via specific oversight in vanilla Super Mario Bros code path; not normally encountered in play
